notes: The Fretboard page now has three views in one - the board, degree-colored tablature, and real treble-clef sheet music - switched with a dropdown, all driven by the same key/scale/pattern and all playable: hit Play in any view and the current note lights up as the exercise runs. Plus the always-visible context bar from 0.13: key, scale, mode, tempo, and time signature in one place, every page linked. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
